product_name: Studio Creator Podcast & Vlog Kit with Microphone & LED Light

bullets: compact design to record on the go
content.description: Record your own podcasts and vlogs like your favorite content creators! The Podcast & Vlog Kit from Studio_Creator brings your video and audio quality to the next level! The kit includes everything you need: a fold-up tabletop tripod with a smartphone holder, LED light, and microphone. The compact design makes it so easy to record digital content at home and on the go! Simply fold up the tabletop tripod into a portable phone grip and take it on your next adventure! Whether you’re vlogging fun memories with your friends or interviewing them for a podcast, your videos will look and sound great! The Podcast & Vlog kit is great for record other types of content too like beauty tutorials, livestreams, singing videos, and so much more! Includes 1 microphone, 1 LED light with 3 light modes, 1 smartphone holder, 1 tabletop trip/portable phone grip, 1 3.5mm audio cable, and instructions. Ages 8+

attributes.whats_in_box: 1 microphone, 1 LED light with 3 light modes, 1 smartphone holder, 1 tabletop trip/portable phone grip, 1 3.5mm audio cable, and instructions
